calendar.matters:
HEARING ON ANTHONY WAYNE BURKES' PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Anthony Wayne Burkes.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings not reported.

Petitioner Anthony Wayne Burkes is present in pro per, placed under oath and testifies.

Chris Taylor (Federal P.O.) is sworn to testify on behalf of Petitioner.

Petition for change of name filed December 15, 2025.

Order to show cause filed December 15, 2025.

Notice of hearing filed March 10, 2026.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name.

Decree signed and filed this date. (D505)
